problem id: e11c9f89
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(7) AND NOT SHR(6)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  00100111 -> 10001100
  10100110 -> 01101110
  01101111 -> 10101001
  10110011 -> 01000110
  10101100 -> 00101011
  11010100 -> 00010111
  00001111 -> 10011000
  11000011 -> 01111111

query: 10001100
predicted answer: 00111011
